label: 1542 CE
era_summary: Year 1542 (MDXLII) was a common year starting on Sunday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1542: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Pope-Papal States, Camerino, 1540-45; Turkey-emperor, Papal states, 1541-44. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
